2604.11512.title: EdgeCIM: A Hardware-Software Co-Design for CIM-Based Acceleration of Small Language Models
2604.11512.paper_summary: The growing demand for deploying Small Language Models (SLMs) on edge devices, including laptops, smartphones, and embedded platforms, has exposed fundamental inefficiencies in existing accelerators. While GPUs handle prefill workloads efficiently, the autoregressive decoding phase is dominated by GEMV operations that are inherently memory-bound, resulting in poor utilization and prohibitive energy costs at the edge. In this work, we present EdgeCIM, a hardware-software co-design framework that rethinks accelerator design for end-to-end decoder-only inference. At its core is a CIM macro, implemented in 65nm, coupled with a tile-based mapping strategy that balances pipeline stages, maximizing parallelism while alleviating DRAM bandwidth bottlenecks. Our simulator enables design space exploration of SLMs up to 4B parameters, identifying Pareto-optimal configurations in terms of latency and energy. Compared to an NVIDIA Orin Nano, EdgeCIM achieves up to 7.3x higher throughput and 49.59x better energy efficiency on LLaMA3.2-1B, and delivers 9.95x higher throughput than Qualcomm SA8255P on LLaMA3.2-3B. Extensive benchmarks on TinyLLaMA-1.1B, LLaMA3.2 (1B, 3B), Phi-3.5-mini-3.8B, Qwen2.5 (0.5B, 1.5B, 3B), SmolLM2-1.7B, SmolLM3-3B, and Qwen3 (0.6B, 1.7B, 4B) reveal that our accelerator, under INT4 precision, achieves on average 336.42 tokens/s and 173.02 tokens/J. These results establish EdgeCIM as a compelling solution towards real-time, energy-efficient edge-scale SLM inference.
2604.11512.paper_summary_zh: 對於在邊緣設備上部署小型語言模型（SLMs）的需求日益增加，包括筆記型電腦、智慧型手機和嵌入式平台，這暴露了現有加速器的基本低效性。雖然GPU能有效處理預填充工作負載，但自回歸解碼階段則以GEMV操作為主，這些操作本質上受限於內存，導致邊緣的利用率低下和高昂的能耗成本。在這項工作中，我們提出了EdgeCIM，一個硬體-軟體共同設計框架，重新思考了端到端僅解碼器推斷的加速器設計。其核心是一個在65nm上實現的CIM宏，結合了一種基於平鋪的映射策略，平衡了管道階段，最大化並行性，同時減輕了DRAM帶寬瓶頸。我們的模擬器使得SLMs的設計空間探索達到4B參數，並在延遲和能耗方面識別出Pareto最優配置。與NVIDIA Orin Nano相比，EdgeCIM在LLaMA3.2-1B上實現了高達7.3倍的吞吐量和49.59倍的能效，而在LLaMA3.2-3B上則提供了比Qualcomm SA8255P高出9.95倍的吞吐量。在TinyLLaMA-1.1B、LLaMA3.2（1B、3B）、Phi-3.5-mini-3.8B、Qwen2.5（0.5B、1.5B、3B）、SmolLM2-1.7B、SmolLM3-3B和Qwen3（0.6B、1.7B、4B）上進行的廣泛基準測試顯示，我們的加速器在INT4精度下，平均達到336.42個標記/秒和173.02個標記/焦耳。這些結果確立了EdgeCIM作為實時、節能的邊緣規模SLM推斷的一個引人注目的解決方案。
2604.11512.author: Jinane Bazzi et.al.
2604.11512.authors: Jinane Bazzi, Mariam Rakka, Fadi Kurdahi, Mohammed E. Fouda, Ahmed Eltawil
